## Carb Targets (Calculated)

| Session type | Duration | Carb target |
|-------------|----------|-------------|
| Swim | Any | No intra-session carbs |
| Bike/Run | 60–90min | 35g/hr |
| Bike/Run | >90min | **40g/hr** |
| Race — Bike | Full distance | **50g/hr** |
| Race — Run | Full distance | **35g/hr** |

**Rationale:** Base target reduced from maximum for mild GI history and no gut training history.

---

## Session Protocols — Week 1

**2026-03-30 — Swim (60min, easy)**
- **Euphoria:** 20–30 min pre-session (CNS priming, 100mg caffeine)
- **Refuel (post):** within 30min of finish

---

**2026-03-31 — Bike (180min, moderate)**
- **Euphoria:** 20–30 min pre-session (CNS priming, 100mg caffeine)
- **Carb target:** 40g/hr → Maurten Gel 100 × 2 per hour
- **Refuel (intra):** at 108min
- **Refuel (post):** within 30min of finish

---

- **Euphoria:** 20–30 min pre-session (CNS priming, 100mg caffeine)

## Race-Day Plan — IRONMAN 140.6

### Pre-Race
- **T−30min:** Euphoria × 1 (CNS priming, 100mg caffeine from Yerba Mate)
- **T−15min:** 500mL electrolyte drink (sodium 600–800mg)

### Swim (no intra-swim fuelling)

### Bike — Target: 50g/hr
| Time | Action |
|------|--------|
| T+30min | Maurten Gel 100 × 1 + 250mL water |
| T+1hr | Refuel × 1 (23g carb, BCAA recovery matrix) |
| T+1hr30 | Maurten Gel 100 × 1 + 250mL water |
| T+2hr | Maurten Gel 100 × 1 |
| T+2hr30 | Refuel × 1 |
| Every 45min | Repeat pattern |

### Run — Target: 35g/hr
- Maurten Gel 100 at km 5, 15, 25 (if 42km run)
- Refuel × 1 at mid-run
- Electrolyte drink at every aid station
